gold.title: Radio Group With Plan Cards
gold.reason: Full plan-card selector with icons, colored icon backgrounds, and Gem/HeartHandshake/Rocket Lucide icons — a polished pricing-tier selector ready to drop into any SaaS pricing page.

gold.title: 3d Radio Group
gold.reason: 3D glass-effect styled-components radio with depth and inner glass sheen — a visually striking, premium aesthetic for plan or option selectors.

gold.title: Glass Radio Group
gold.reason: Glassmorphism radio group with frosted label cards — immediately premium-looking; ideal for pricing or feature-tier selectors on modern landing pages.

gold.title: Radio Group Card
gold.reason: Card-style Radix radio items with rich styling — a clean, production-ready card-selector that elevates any plan/option choice UI.

gold.title: Circular Fan Speed Knob
gold.reason: Radial/circular radio selector with options arranged around a center — a genuinely unique interaction pattern that would make a product page memorable.

gold.title: Sentiment Radio Group
gold.reason: Sentiment-scale radio with emotionally expressive visual states — great for NPS, satisfaction, or feedback sections on product landing pages.

gold.title: Emoji Radio Group
gold.reason: Emoji-enhanced Radix radio items — visually playful and engaging, an excellent choice for survey, feedback, or onboarding flows on a SaaS page.

silver.title: Animated Radio
silver.reason: Animated Free/Basic/Premium plan radio with sliding indicator — a classic segmented-control pattern with smooth state transitions, good for pricing toggles.

silver.title: Radio
silver.reason: CVA-powered RadioGroup with orientation variants and AnimatePresence Framer Motion on the indicator — polished and themeable.

silver.title: Radio Group Card Vertical Demo
silver.reason: Vertical card radio with icon, colored background, title, and description per option — a solid plan-selector pattern with good visual hierarchy.

silver.title: Radio Group List
silver.reason: List-style radio with Badge labels and cn-driven selection states — a clean, functional plan-list pattern with clear visual feedback.

silver.title: Radio Group Animated
silver.reason: Animated shadcn RadioGroupItem with flex alignment and label pairing — a small but noticeable improvement over the static default.

silver.title: Radio Group Dashed Demo
silver.reason: Dashed border primary-colored radio items — a subtle but visually distinct styling choice that reads as intentional and branded.

silver.title: Rating Scale Group
silver.reason: Rating scale radio (1–5 or similar) built on Radix — a clean, purpose-built pattern useful for review or feedback sections.

silver.title: Review Filter Bars
silver.reason: Star-rated filter bars using RiStarFill icons on Radix radio — a visually clear review-filter pattern suitable for e-commerce or review page redesigns.

silver.title: Radio Group
silver.reason: Icon-enhanced radio options with configurable font, borderRadius, and LucideIcon per item — flexible, visually richer than a plain radio list.

silver.title: Radio Group [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Accessible react-aria RadioGroup with validation, FieldError, and Text slots — solid accessible implementation.

silver.title: Radio Group Colors Demo
silver.reason: Color-variant radio items (destructive, warning, success, etc.) — useful for status or alert-level selection, clear visual language.

bronze.title: Radio Group 1
bronze.reason: Bare shadcn RadioGroup with Label pairs — the minimum possible wrapper, no visual upgrade.

bronze.title: Radio Group
bronze.reason: Ark-UI RadioGroup with plain flex layout and minimal styling — functional but no visual differentiation from a browser default.

bronze.title: Radio Group
bronze.reason: The raw shadcn base RadioGroup component — the baseline all others are compared against.

bronze.title: Radio
bronze.reason: Custom RadioGroup context with clsx/twMerge — correct implementation but no visual distinction beyond standard radio styling.
